calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Ateyeh M. Atehey, individually and dba Rose Food Mart.
Declaration of Walter Gibbs pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $6,658.02
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $365.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $7,023.02
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Set For Trial On May-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
